title: stenotaphrum glabrum var. multiflorum
intro: Stenotaphrum glabrum var. multiflorum, also known as the Buffalo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum glabrum var. multiflorum include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
